name: Plugin review

## Plugin summary

## Plugin source

- Repository or package path:
- Version:
- Author or maintainer:

## Requested permissions

- [ ] File read
- [ ] File write
- [ ] Process execution
- [ ] Network access
- [ ] Desktop automation
- [ ] Clipboard access
- [ ] Memory access
- [ ] Other:

## Safety notes

Explain why each permission is needed and how the plugin limits risk.

## Validation

- [ ] Manifest validates
- [ ] Signature or trusted signer is documented
- [ ] No secrets are included
- [ ] Tests or manual verification are included

## Reviewer notes

Do not paste real tokens, private paths, or user data.
